summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink Iteration 11 features completed. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Album management (create, view, delete), AI Listing Creator page with photo upload step, Profile shortcuts (My Albums, AI Listing, Seller Tools), and navigation between pages. Fixed bug: Frontend was calling wrong endpoint /api/ai-tools/suggest-price instead of /api/ai-tools/price-suggestions.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED: Frontend was calling /api/ai-tools/suggest-price but backend endpoint is /api/ai-tools/price-suggestions

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/albums/create - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/albums/create - Creates album successfully with all fields
Backend: POST /api/albums/create - Creates private album correctly
Backend: GET /api/albums/my - Returns user's albums with count
Backend: GET /api/albums/{album_id} - Returns album detail with owner info
Backend: GET /api/albums/{album_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent album
Backend: DELETE /api/albums/{album_id} - Deletes album successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/albums/{album_id} - Returns 404 for non-existent album
Backend: POST /api/albums/{album_id}/upload - Uploads image to album
Backend: POST /api/albums/{album_id}/upload - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/albums/generate-thumbnail - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/albums/generate-thumbnail - Returns 422 for non-existent video
Backend: GET /api/upload/files/thumbnails/{filename} - Returns 404 for non-existent thumbnail
Backend: GET /api/upload/files/thumbnails/{filename} - Endpoint is accessible
Backend: POST /api/ai-tools/analyze-listing - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/ai-tools/price-suggestions - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/ai-tools/analyze-listing - Endpoint exists and responds
Backend: POST /api/ai-tools/price-suggestions - Endpoint exists and responds
Backend: GET /api/albums/album_50a500af1f42 - Existing album check
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/listings - Requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/marketplace/listings - Creates listing successfully
Frontend: Profile page shows My Albums, AI Listing, Seller Tools shortcuts
Frontend: Albums page loads and displays user albums
Frontend: Create Album dialog works with all options (name, description, media type, privacy)
Frontend: Album creation shows success toast
Frontend: Album detail view shows empty state with Upload button
Frontend: AI Listing Creator page loads with photo upload step
Frontend: Navigation from Profile to Albums works
Frontend: Navigation from Profile to AI Listing Creator works
Frontend: Navigation from Profile to Seller Dashboard works
critical_code_review_comments: Album CRUD endpoints (/api/albums/create, /api/albums/my, /api/albums/{id}, DELETE) all working correctly
Video thumbnail generation with FFmpeg is implemented and endpoint exists at /api/albums/generate-thumbnail
File upload to album via /api/albums/{album_id}/upload works correctly
Thumbnail file serving via /api/upload/files/thumbnails/{filename} endpoint exists
Profile page correctly shows shortcuts grid with My Albums, AI Listing, Seller Tools, Earnings, Withdraw, Upload Media
Albums page has proper CRUD UI with create dialog, album cards, and detail view
AI Listing Creator has step-by-step flow (Upload→AI Analysis→Price→Publish)
FIXED: Frontend AIListingCreator.jsx was calling wrong endpoint - changed from /api/ai-tools/suggest-price to /api/ai-tools/price-suggestions
MOCKED: AI analysis in AI Listing Creator falls back to demo data when LLM budget exceeded (as documented)
seed_data_creation: Created test albums during testing (TEST_Album_Iteration11, Test Album from Playwright)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 testing completed. All requested features verified: Album management with CRUD operations, video thumbnail generation endpoint (FFmpeg installed at /usr/bin/ffmpeg), AI Listing Creator with step-by-step flow, Profile shortcuts for Albums/AI Listing/Seller Tools. Fixed frontend bug where AIListingCreator.jsx was calling wrong price suggestion endpoint. MOCKED: AI analysis falls back to demo data when LLM budget exceeded. Test user has 3 active listings and 11372 BL coins.
